import { Meta, Title, Description, Story, Controls, Subtitle } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'
import * as ButtonStories from '../components/Button.stories'
import figmaDocs from '../components/Button.figma.generated'

<Meta title="Components/Button/Figma Docs" />

<Title />
<Subtitle>{figmaDocs.generatedAt ? `Synced from Figma (${figmaDocs.generatedAt})` : 'Not yet synced from Figma'}</Subtitle>

<Description>{figmaDocs.componentDescription}</Description>

{figmaDocs.figmaUrl ? (
  <p>
    <a href={figmaDocs.figmaUrl} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Open source node in Figma</a>
  </p>
) : null}

{figmaDocs.figmaProperties?.length ? (
  <>
    <h2>Figma properties</h2>
    <ul>
      {figmaDocs.figmaProperties.map((prop) => (
        <li key={prop.name}>
          <strong>{prop.name}</strong>
          {prop.defaultValue != null ? ` (default: ${String(prop.defaultValue)})` : ''}
          {prop.description ? ` — ${prop.description}` : ''}
        </li>
      ))}
    </ul>
  </>
) : null}

<Story of={ButtonStories.Default} />
<Controls of={ButtonStories.Default} />
